basic_details.job_title: HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Himachal Pradesh Public Service Commission (HPPSC) has officially released a recruitment notification for Assistant Professor. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 06-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 04-07-2026

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years and below Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

_labels.notification_pdf: HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 is 04 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 37 Assistant Professor vacancies have been announced across various medical specialties.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: All candidates, irrespective of category or gender, are required to pay a uniform application fee of Rs. 600.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates should be 45 years of age or below as on 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What educational qualification is required for HPPSC Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a recognized medical qualification along with the required postgraduate degree in the relevant specialty and prescribed teaching experience as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Rs. 37,400–67,000 with Grade Pay Rs. 8,900, while some posts are offered under Pay Level-30 (Rs. 1,29,700–2,14,300).

faq.question: Q7. When did the online application process begin for HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process started on 06 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Which specialties are included in HPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Vacancies are available in specialties including General Surgery, Dermatology, Orthopaedics, General Medicine, Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, ENT, Ophthalmology, Forensic Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynaecology, and Community Medicine.
